_comment: Template only. Copy to $LTHCS_OPS_CONFIG (default: ~/.config/runn/lthcs-ops.config.json) and fill in real values. The real file MUST NOT be committed — see .gitignore. The 'sites' keys are the logical labels the model sees ('A', 'B', 'RECEIVER', …); the values are resolved server-side and never reach the model's context. Optional per-site fields (vm_name, service_port, service_host, db_path, db_gstat_cmd) are read by the vm_liveness / db_health_check tools; replication_kick_cmd is the operator-supplied command kick_replication runs on the sender (`{dataset}` is substituted, or the dataset is appended); replication_kill_cmd is an optional override for kill_stuck_send (default: pgrep `zfs send` matching the dataset → SIGTERM). Sites that don't set a field simply can't be reached by the corresponding tool.
